_comment: Curated, real CVE records for the ML inference-serving stack. CVE-JSON 5.0 subset. Add records here to extend coverage; the engine never invents CVE identifiers.

descriptions.value: vLLM's Completions API deserialises user-supplied tensor embeddings with torch.load, permitting an out-of-bounds write that can lead to remote code execution on the inference server.
vLLM loads model weights from a HuggingFace checkpoint using torch.load with weights_only=False, allowing a malicious checkpoint to execute arbitrary code during deserialisation.
vLLM resolves model classes from a checkpoint's config.json auto_map field without restriction, enabling code injection and remote code execution when loading an attacker-influenced model.

descriptions.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code (Code Injection)

descriptions.value: vLLM's PyNcclPipe distributed transport deserialises peer messages with pickle.loads while the TCPStore listens on all interfaces, exposing an unauthenticated remote code execution path.
